title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE SABANG ELEMENTARY   SCHOOL  IN  THE  BARRIO   OF SABANG, CITY OF LIPA, TO G. B. LONTOK MEMORIAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3244 / 52 OG No. 6, 2970 (June, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1423, June 10, 1956 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE SABANG ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE BARRIO OF SABANG, CITY OF LIPA, TO G. B. LONTOK MEMORIAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Sabang Elementary School in the barrio of Sabang, City of Lipa, is changed to G. B. Lontok Memorial Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 10, 1956.
